description: Persistent long-term memory layer for AI agents — store, search, and forget user-specific facts that survive across sessions. Closes the 'goldfish memory' gap.

add-memory.notes: Add a new memory tied to a user_id (and optional agent_id, run_id). Body: { messages: [{role, content}], user_id }. Mem0 auto-extracts atomic facts from the messages.

search-memory.notes: Semantic search over a user's memories. Body: { query, user_id, limit }. Returns ranked memories with relevance scores — feed into LLM context.

list-memories.notes: List all memories for a user_id (paginated). Use ?user_id=&page=&page_size=.

get-memory.notes: Fetch a single memory by ID.

update-memory.notes: Replace a memory's content. Body: { data: '...' }.

history.notes: Audit trail of changes to a memory (created/updated/deleted events).
